title: iria pycnocephala
intro: Iria pycnocephala is a plant species commonly known as the Iriomote isopogon, which belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Iria pycnocephala has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, although its availability and usage may vary due to its native habitat and limited research.
